title: Draft alignment plan for .rules and README updates
summary: Define the concrete update plan for .rules and README* based on mismatches identified in p1-t1.
acceptance_criteria: Planned changes list targeted sections and intended edits for .rules.
Planned changes list targeted sections and intended edits for README.md and README-jp.md.
Plan is consistent with current MCP server behavior and supports downstream implementation tickets.

steps.description: Translate p1-t1 mismatches into a concrete edit plan for .rules.
Translate p1-t1 mismatches into a concrete edit plan for README.md and README-jp.md.
Validate the planned edits against current src/ behavior to avoid contradictions.

notes: Plan (.rules): remove references to non-existent tools (`journal_append`, `roll_forward_replay`, `continue_state_rebuild`), align handoff-derived-only phrasing with init template, and ensure tooling list matches tool registry (tx_event_append/tx_state_save/tx_state_rebuild/repo_verify/repo_commit/ops_*).
Plan (.rules): clarify verification step to invoke the verify tool or script consistently and keep ordering/persistence steps aligned with actual tx event taxonomy.
Plan (README.md/README-jp.md): update init command naming (`zed-agentops-init` vs `zed-agentops-init.sh`) and `--update` behavior description to match script behavior.

Plan (README.md/README-jp.md): correct `ops_handoff_export` signature (no path argument), remove `truncate_limit` claim unless added to tool schemas, and add `.agent/observability_summary.json` to “Where things live”.
Plan (README parity): align English/Japanese workflow tips (include ops_* task tracking consistently) and remove any tool references not present in tool registry.
